plugin_desc: Avaya（含原 Nortel/Bay Networks 资产）企业级路由器/三层路由交换机专用 SNMP 采集模板（RAPID-CITY/AVAYA 私有 MIB，企业号 6889）。除标准 IF-MIB 64 位 HC 接口流量外，额外采集 Avaya 私有 OID 的设备健康指标——CPU 使用率（直接以百分比上报）与主内存（已用 + 空闲，字节，用量按 已用/（已用+空闲）推导）。Avaya 企业路由平台多为固定配置紧凑机型，其私有 MIB 未以无需行级过滤的标量形式暴露独立温度/风扇/电源传感器，故温度、风扇与电源为 N/A。适用品牌型号——Avaya ERS / VSP 系列路由平台（企业号 6889；含原 Nortel/Bay Networks 资产）。
name: Router

metrics.name: device_cpu_usage
metrics.description: CPU utilisation of the Avaya router (RAPID-CITY/AVAYA MIB, reported directly as a percentage).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCInOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric calculates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, measured in bytes per second, from the 64-bit IF-MIB ifHCOutOctets counter (ifXTable).

metrics.name: device_memory_used
metrics.description: Used memory of the Avaya router in bytes (AVAYA MIB used memory).

metrics.name: device_memory_free
metrics.description: Free memory of the Avaya router in bytes (AVAYA MIB free memory).

metrics.name: device_memory_usage
metrics.description: Memory utilisation of the Avaya router, derived as used/(used+free).
